Strategy

Snipping Tool - the Click to Do Bet

Turning a capture from a static image into an actionable surface.

TL;DR

The FY27 bet integrates Snipping Tool with Click to Do so a capture becomes actionable - text and entities are recognized on-device and contextual actions appear inline, removing the manual copy/paste/switch-app loop.

Why now

  • Users already screenshot to act on content - copy text, look things up, share.
  • Click to Do provides on-device intelligence to recognize text and entities.
  • Combining them removes the manual copy/paste/switch-app loop.

The shift

The bet turns "screenshot" into "get something done."

Goals

  1. Recognize

    Detect text and entities in any capture.

  2. Act

    Offer contextual actions: copy text, search, translate, open link.

  3. Stay fast and private

    Keep processing on-device where possible.

Metrics we care about

382M

Monthly active devices

+12%

Quarter-over-quarter usage

Growth

4.6

Average store rating

Phases

  1. FY26 Q3 - Discovery

    Discovery and research.

  2. FY26 Q4 - Prototype

    Prototype recognition and actions.

  3. FY27 Q1 - Ship

    Ship first actions to Insiders.

Old vs new flow

Today

Capture → save/paste → switch app → act.

With the bet

Capture → actions appear inline → act.

Risks

  • Accuracy Recognition on noisy captures.
  • Privacy Expectations for on-device processing.
  • Discoverability Finding the new actions.
